ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weapon_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon type (e.g., Melee, Missile) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weapon type */,
  "weapon_type_icon" TEXT /* Icon or symbol associated with the weapon type */,
  "weapon_type_color" TEXT /* Color code for the weapon type for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "reference_text" TEXT /* Detailed text of the reference */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the reference (e.g., rulebook, campaign guide) */,
  "reference_page_number" INTEGER /* Page number in the source where the reference is found */,
  "reference_url" TEXT /* URL to the source if it's online */,
  "reference_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the reference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., game designer, player) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_icon" TEXT /* Icon or symbol associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the scenario was created */,
  "scenario_status" TEXT /* Status of the scenario (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "scenario_type" TEXT /* Type of the scenario (e.g., campaign, mission, battle) */,
  "scenario_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the scenario */,
  "scenario_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image or map of the scenario */,
  "scenario_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the scenario for advanced search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit (e.g., infantry, vehicle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the unit */,
  "unit_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the unit in game currency */,
  "unit_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the unit (e.g., common, rare, legendary) */,
  "unit_strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the unit */,
  "unit_toughness" INTEGER /* Toughness of the unit */,
  "unit_wounds" INTEGER /* Number of wounds the unit can take */,
  "unit_save" TEXT /* Save value of the unit */,
  "unit_special_rules" TEXT /* Special rules or abilities of the unit */,
  "unit_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_weapons" (
  "unit_weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit-weapon relationship */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the weapon equipped to the unit */,
  "unit_weapon_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the weapon usage in the unit */,
  "unit_weapon_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the unit-weapon relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_weapon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_weapons_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_weapons_weapon_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_id") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_units" (
  "scenario_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario-unit relationship */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "unit_count" INTEGER /* Number of units involved in the scenario */,
  "scenario_unit_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the unit in the scenario */,
  "scenario_unit_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the scenario-unit relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_units_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_units_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits made by the weapon */,
  "wounds" INTEGER /* Number of wounds inflicted by the weapon */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills made by the weapon */,
  "weapon_performance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the weapon's performance in the scenario */,
  "weapon_performance_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the performance data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_performance_weapon_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_id") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_performance_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_target" TEXT /* Target of the access (e.g., weapon, scenario) */,
  "access_target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target being accessed */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the weapon available for the scenario */,
  "weapon_inventory_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the inventory */,
  "weapon_inventory_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_inventory_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_inventory_weapon_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_id") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id")
)
